title: 核心英语单词记忆词卡
notes: Core English is generated from the publishable SQLite view.
Remote source images fall back to project-local game art.

cards.hint: The superhero will attack the villain and protect everyone.
cards.example: The superhero will attack the villain and protect everyone.
cards.exampleZh: 超级英雄会攻击坏人并保护大家。

cards.example: I eat apples every day.

cards.example: I ride my bicycle to school.
cards.exampleZh: 我骑自行车去上学。

cards.hint: The boat sails on the lake.
cards.example: The boat sails on the lake.
cards.exampleZh: 这艘船在湖上航行。

cards.hint: The bus takes us to school.
cards.example: The bus takes us to school.
cards.exampleZh: 公交车载我们去学校。

cards.hint: The car moves fast.
cards.example: The car moves fast.
cards.exampleZh: 这辆汽车开得很快。

cards.hint: The motorcycle rides carefully on the sunny road.
cards.example: The motorcycle rides carefully on the sunny road.
cards.exampleZh: 摩托车小心地行驶在阳光明媚的道路上。

cards.hint: The plane flies high above the clouds.
cards.example: The plane flies high above the clouds.
cards.exampleZh: 飞机在云朵上方高高地飞翔。

cards.hint: We rode the subway to school.
cards.example: We rode the subway to school.
cards.exampleZh: 我们乘地铁去上学。

cards.hint: We waved, and the friendly taxi stopped for us.
cards.example: We waved, and the friendly taxi stopped for us.
cards.exampleZh: 我们挥挥手，友好的出租车为我们停了下来。

cards.hint: The train moves very fast.
cards.example: The train moves very fast.
cards.exampleZh: 火车开得很快。

cards.hint: The truck carries fresh apples.
cards.example: The truck carries fresh apples.
cards.exampleZh: 这辆卡车运送新鲜的苹果。

cards.hint: The sky is clear today.
cards.example: The sky is clear today.
cards.exampleZh: 今天天空很晴朗。

cards.hint: It is cloudy today.
cards.example: It is cloudy today.
cards.exampleZh: 今天是多云天气。

cards.hint: We watched bright lightning from a safe window.
cards.example: We watched bright lightning from a safe window.
cards.exampleZh: 我们从安全的窗户旁观看了明亮的闪电。

cards.hint: Rain makes flowers grow happily.
cards.example: Rain makes flowers grow happily.
cards.exampleZh: 雨让花儿快乐地生长。

cards.hint: Snow makes our playground sparkle in the morning.
cards.example: Snow makes our playground sparkle in the morning.
cards.exampleZh: 雪让我们的操场在早晨闪闪发光。

cards.hint: We watched the storm from our cozy home.
cards.example: We watched the storm from our cozy home.
cards.exampleZh: 我们在舒适的家里观看暴风雨。

cards.hint: We listened to the gentle thunder from our cozy room.
cards.example: We listened to the gentle thunder from our cozy room.
cards.exampleZh: 我们在舒适的房间里听着轻柔的雷声。
